mapper.sql: id, activity_id, group_no, rollback_together, atomic_activation, unified_reboot, failure_policy, fail_threshold, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_activity_group_policy ( id, activity_id, group_no, rollback_together, atomic_activation, unified_reboot, failure_policy, fail_threshold, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{groupNo}, #{rollbackTogether}, #{atomicActivation}, #{unifiedReboot}, #{failurePolicy}, #{failThreshold}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_activity_group_policy ( id, activity_id, group_no, rollback_together, atomic_activation, unified_reboot, failure_policy, fail_threshold, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.activityId}, #{item.groupNo}, #{item.rollbackTogether}, #{item.atomicActivation}, #{item.unifiedReboot}, #{item.failurePolicy}, #{item.failThreshold}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_activity_group_policy t SET
t.activity_id = #{activityId},
t.group_no = #{groupNo},
t.rollback_together = #{rollbackTogether},
t.atomic_activation = #{atomicActivation},
t.unified_reboot = #{unifiedReboot},
t.failure_policy = #{failurePolicy},
t.fail_threshold = #{failThreshold},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_activity_group_policy t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_activity_group_policy t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_activity_group_policy t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_activity_group_policy t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT FROM tb_activity_group_policy t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY t.group_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_activity_group_policy t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.activity_id = #{activityId} AND t.row_valid = 1
